name: io.github.mau240987/garmin-mcp-server
description: MCP Server for Garmin Connect — read activities, health data, and push structured training plans from any AI assistant.

environment_variables.name: GARMIN_EMAIL
environment_variables.description: Garmin Connect account email (required on first login only; tokens are cached afterwards)

environment_variables.name: GARMIN_PASSWORD
environment_variables.description: Garmin Connect account password (required on first login only)

environment_variables.name: GARTH_TOKEN_DIR
environment_variables.description: Directory where garth OAuth tokens are persisted (default: ~/.garth)
